name: kucoin-trader
description: Professional KuCoin (KC) trading system - multi-account support, spot/margin/futures trading, asset transfers.

skills.name: kucoin_accounts
skills.description: List all KuCoin account balances across all account types (spot, margin, futures)

skills.name: kucoin_transfer
skills.description: Transfer assets between KuCoin account types (main, trade, margin, futures)

skills.name: kucoin_trade
skills.description: Execute spot trades on KuCoin (market or limit orders)

skills.name: kucoin_market
skills.description: Get market data and ticker information for trading pairs

skills.name: kucoin_orders
skills.description: Query all types of orders (spot, margin, futures)

skills.name: kucoin_margin
skills.description: Margin trading - cross/isolated margin, borrow, repay, and trade with leverage

skills.name: kucoin_futures
skills.description: Futures trading - trade perpetual contracts with leverage
